$comment: A2A Agent Card for MuHaven (Wave 4 P4). Discovery-only — A2A is NOT used as a payment rail (research §6: Google AP2 integrates with x402, doesn't replace it). External agents (VibeKit, Google ADK) can use this card to discover MuHaven's tool surface and confirmation contract.
name: MuHaven RWA Portfolio Agent
description: Confidential real-world-asset (RWA) portfolio management on Fhenix CoFHE. Investors hold encrypted token balances and receive yield privately. The agent reads encrypted positions, drafts buys + claims, and submits via three-tier confirmation (inline Telegram callback, Mini App OTP, dashboard passkey). NEVER auto-submits funds-moving operations without user-side cryptographic confirmation.

schemes.$comment_a2a_pay: AP2-style payment delegation is NOT supported in this card. MuHaven enforces three-tier confirmation server-side; an A2A peer cannot bypass the confirmation surface.

skills.name: Read encrypted portfolio
skills.description: Return the authenticated investor's encrypted-balance portfolio summary. Output exposes only public aggregates (token list, ebool isOverexposed / isUnderYield handles); decrypted balances are NEVER included.

skills.name: Read yield history
skills.description: Return per-token yield history (cleartext aggregates only — distribution dates, total funded amounts, epoch numbers).

skills.name: Read distribution status
skills.description: Return distribution status for a (token, epoch). Cleartext aggregates only.

skills.name: List held RWA tokens
skills.description: List the RWA tokens the authenticated user holds (token addresses + symbols + decimals).

skills.name: Read agent audit log
skills.description: Return the user's tiered-autonomy audit log entries. Cursor-paginated.

skills.name: Stage buy intent
skills.description: PROPOSE a Subscription buy. Returns an unsigned UserOp envelope routed through the three-tier confirmation surface based on intent notional. NEVER auto-submits.
examples: Buy $200 of TBILL-A — routes to Telegram inline confirm
Buy $1500 of TBILL-A — routes to Mini App + 6-digit OTP
Buy $25000 of TBILL-A — routes to dashboard passkey deep-link

skills.name: Stage claim intent
skills.description: PROPOSE a yield claim from RedemptionQueue / YieldSnapshot. Returns an unsigned UserOp envelope. Idempotent — proposing twice produces the same intent hash.

skills.name: Pause kill-switch
skills.description: Activate the /pause kill-switch — uninstalls the on-chain @zerodev/permissions validator. Cascade-mode pauses every Wave 4 surface.

skills.name: Session-key state
skills.description: Return the current ZeroDev session-key validator state for the requested surface: tier, validator address, valid-until timestamp, recent action count.

confirmation_contract.$comment: Three-tier dispatcher. External A2A peers MUST honour the confirmation requirement — there is no API path that bypasses tier dispatch.

tiers.user_action: single tap on inline Confirm button
Mini App + 6-digit OTP entered in app
tiers.$comment: OTP is delivered out-of-band as a separate Telegram message; defends against chat-stuffing where the LLM drafts a Confirm button users tap on autopilot.

tiers.$comment_boundary: Inclusive upper bounds on the prior tiers — anything above mini_app_otp.amount_max_usd6 falls here. classifyTier in the backend uses `<=` for both prior tier boundaries.
tiers.$comment: Phishing-resistant by construction — WebAuthn RP-ID is bound to muhaven.app; a Telegram-based MITM cannot complete passkey.

tiered_autonomy.$comment: Investor's per-surface tier governs whether agent calls require user confirmation at all. See development/DEV_WAVE_4/ADR_LOG.md ADR-0.

fhe.$comment: Decrypted plaintext is NEVER returned over A2A. Peers that need to display a balance must request a permit-bound decrypt via the user's session, not via the agent.

compliance.issuer_label_resolution: OnchainID-resolved verified label always shown above any state-mutating CTA

$comment_evolution: Future versions may add: (1) AP2-style explicit payment delegation, (2) finer-grained scope for read.audit (compliance-only role), (3) per-skill cost hints for capability ranking. Bumps schema_version when a backwards-incompatible change lands.
